query:
CREATE TABLE `user_notifications` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`message` text NOT NULL,
	`type` enum('success','error','info','warning') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'info',
	`projectId` int,
	`readAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `user_notifications_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3HSDZo5GWG3argo.root --database gwVBgn9SLQhabuuxC5oTDT --execute CREATE TABLE `user_notifications` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`message` text NOT NULL,
	`type` enum('success','error','info','warning') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'info',
	`projectId` int,
	`readAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `user_notifications_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
